text: Natural language processing, or NLP, is a field of artificial intelligence that helps computers understand human language. It goes beyond simple word recognition; NLP enables machines to grasp the meaning and context of text. This technology powers automatic translation services, allowing instant conversion between languages. Sentiment analysis is another common application, where computers evaluate written feedback to detect positive or negative opinions. Finally, NLP is the engine behind chatbots, which can answer questions and hold conversations with users. From translating documents to analyzing customer reviews, NLP is transforming how we interact with technology.
